query:
-- Update monthlyRevenue on services from their billing assignments
UPDATE services s
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(bi.lineAmount), 0)
  FROM service_billing_assignments sba
  JOIN billing_items bi ON bi.externalId = sba.billingItemExternalId
  WHERE sba.serviceExternalId = s.externalId
    AND bi.matchStatus = 'service-matched'
)
WHERE s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination');

-- Also update customer monthlyRevenue from their services
UPDATE customers c
SET monthlyRevenue = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(s.monthlyRevenue), 0)
  FROM services s
  WHERE s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
    AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated', 'flagged_for_termination')
);
